offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate payroll tax calculations cause potential penalties. We provide a payroll tax calculation service instead of manual calculations or generic accounting software.
problem: Inaccurate payroll tax calculations leading to potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Join community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try manual payroll tax calculation tool for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
